response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across multiple tech stacks, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google — a key requirement. His track record in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source tooling demonstrates strong engineering judgment and initiative. However, his resume contains questionable employment dates (e.g., current role at Google starting in 2025) and lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java, which are core to the role.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, aligning with a key requirement
Strong open-source contributions and advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
concerns: Employment dates appear anachronistic (e.g., Google role starting in 2025), raising credibility concerns
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — secondary but required technologies
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
